document.docAuthor: Han, Yuan-Yuan, Achterberg, Kees Van & Chen, Xue-Xin
document.masterDocTitle: Review of the genera Breviterebra Kusigemati, Charops Holmgren and Scenocharops Uchida (Hymenoptera, Ichneumonidae, Campopleginae) from China, with description of three new species

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Review of the genera Breviterebra Kusigemati, Charops Holmgren and Scenocharops Uchida (Hymenoptera, Ichneumonidae, Campopleginae) from China, with description of three new species

mods:name.mods:affiliation: State Key Lab of Rice Biology, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou 310058, China & yyhan 6 @ zju. edu. cn; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0002 - 6438 - 7393

subSubSection.paragraph:
Material examined.

15.IX.1977
, No 771259

, He Junhua , No 878838

Distribution. China ( Anhui , Beijing , Fujian , Guangdong , Guangxi , Guizhou , Hainan , Hebei , Heilongjiang , Henan , Hubei , Hunan , Jiangsu , Jiangxi , Jilin , Liaoning , Shaanxi , Shandong , Sichuan , Taiwan , Yunnan, Zhejiang); Australia , Bangladesh , Japan , Korea , Malaysia , Pakistan , Russia , Sri Lanka , Thailand .
